title: The Criminal Procedure (Identification) Act, 2022
full_text: The Criminal Procedure (Identification) Act, 2022 दंड प्रक्रिया (शनाख्त) अधिनियम, 2022 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 2022-11 Act Number: 11 Enactment Date: 2022-04-18 Act Year: 2022 Short Title: The Criminal Procedure (Identification) Act, 2022 Hindi Title: दंड प्रक्रिया (शनाख्त) अधिनियम, 2022 Long Title: An Act to authorise for taking measurements of convicts and other persons for the purposes of identification and investigation in criminal matters and to preserve records and for matters connected therewith and incidental thereto. Ministry: Ministry of Home Affairs Department: Department of Internal Security Enforcement Date: 4-8-2022 TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Criminal Procedure (Identification) Act, 2022 Show all section Section 1. Short title and commencement. Section 2. Definitions. Section 3. Taking of measurement. Section 4. Collection, storing, preservation of measurements and storing, sharing, dissemination, destruction and disposal of records. Section 5. Power of Magistrate to direct a person to give measurements. Section 6. Resistance to allow taking of measurements. Section 7. Bar of suit. Section 8. Power to make rules. Section 9. Power to remove difficulties. Section 10. Repeal and saving.
